segments.title: Country of Origin

segments.title: Vehicle Type
segments.description: The third character indicates the vehicle type. For example, “F” represents a passenger car.

segments.description: The fourth to eighth characters provide information about the vehicle’s attributes, such as the model, engine type, and series.

segments.title: Check Digit
segments.description: The ninth character is a mathematical formula-generated digit used for verifying the accuracy of the VIN.

segments.title: Model Year
segments.description: The tenth character represents the model year of the vehicle. It can be a letter or a number.

segments.title: Assembly Plant
segments.description: The eleventh character indicates the assembly plant where the vehicle was manufactured.

segments.title: Production Sequence
segments.description: The twelfth to seventeenth characters represent the production sequence number, which is a unique identifier for each vehicle.
